title: Crisp Greek Gratin
description: A rich and creamy Greek gratin with a satisfying crunch. Perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a baking dish, combine the grated gratin and sliced mushroom.
In a separate bowl, mix the melted buttery and crushed crisp.
Pour the mixture over the gratin and mushroom mixture.
Top with shredded cheese and bake for 25-30 minutes.
Broil for an additional 2-3 minutes to crisp the top.
Let the gratin rest for 5-10 minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional grated gratin and mushroom if desired.
